overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic commercial district at night, ascending stairs to an upper level, and exploring a rooftop lounge with panoramic city views.

glowing cyan linear lights along the ceiling edge

tropical palm tree in large planter

modern glass facade building with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a futuristic commercial plaza with highly reflective marble floors and cyan neon lighting. Large digital billboards including a prominent DYNALAR advertisement line the walls as the character moves from a covered area into an open walkway with palm trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior staircase with large neon signage

events.description: begins ascending the concrete stairs toward the upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs toward the upper level

entered.detail: large illuminated white sign spelling SECHO mounted on the building
wide concrete staircase with metal railings
silver metal safety railing along the stairs
glass and steel structure of the upper level
view of the street level descending below

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and climbs a wide concrete staircase flanked by metal railings. A massive illuminated SECHO sign dominates the view above as the character ascends toward the upper pedestrian level, leaving the ground plaza behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city overlook

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and emerges onto upper overlook
pauses to look down at the street level and intersection below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway, pausing to look at the city view below

entered.detail: multi-level road system visible beneath the walkway
transparent glass barrier along the edge of the overlook
surrounding skyscrapers with colorful neon illumination
street intersection with moving vehicle lights visible below
high-rise apartment buildings with lit windows
wide tiled walkway at the upper level

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the upper level, the character walks along an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings overlooking the city. The SECHO sign is now adjacent as the character pauses to observe the traffic and neon-lit buildings below before continuing along the overlook.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered upper level corridor with advertising

events.description: enters covered corridor with neon signage reading NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE!

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered corridor with reflective floors and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange vest walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: illuminated yellow text sign reading NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE!
glass and metal framed entrance to the covered walkway
large screen displaying firearm advertisement with SPECIAL EDITION text
long covered passage with reflective flooring
automated kiosks lining the corridor wall
recessed lighting in the corridor ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered corridor illuminated by overhead lights and neon signage. The floor is highly reflective marble, and digital advertisements including a prominent gun ad line the walls. Other pedestrians are visible walking through this transitional space.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop lounge with neon decor and city views

events.description: enters neon-lit lounge with checkered wall patterns and seating areas
approaches railing to observe the night cityscape with floating vehicles

agents.ego_description: entering the rooftop lounge and approaching the railing to view the city skyline

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at the bar counter facing away from camera

black leather seating arranged around tables

segments.scene_description: The character enters a stylish rooftop lounge featuring checkered neon walls in pink and cyan, leather sofas, and a bar area. Patrons sit at the counter as the character moves toward the outdoor terrace to overlook the sprawling neon-lit cityscape with floating vehicles visible in the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a reflective commercial plaza upward into a high-end rooftop lounge overlooking a futuristic metropolis. It begins by gliding across marble floors under cyan neon lighting and past a large DYNALAR billboard, moving from a covered area into an open walkway lined with palm trees. As the character approaches a wide concrete staircase, the camera ascends toward a massive illuminated SECHO sign, leaving the ground plaza behind to emerge onto an elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings. The scene then shifts through a covered corridor of reflective floors and digital gun advertisements before opening into a stylish lounge characterized by pink and cyan checkered walls and leather sofas. Finally, the camera moves past the bar area and out onto an outdoor terrace, revealing a sprawling neon-lit cityscape filled with floating vehicles in the night sky.
